text:
The Battle Olympia is the Heavens Arena's biennial combat festival. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 6, Chapter 49 

Overview

The Battle Olympia takes place on the 251 st floor of the Heavens Arena, which also houses the penthouse for the winner of the tournament. It is an event only open to Floor Masters to participate in. The event is also used as a selling point to try and entice new competitors to work their way up the Heavens Arena. 

The Last Mission

 Note: Events occurring in Hunter × Hunter: The Last Mission do not constitute canon material. 

Participants

Zushi
Kanjiru
Hae
Yamanezumi
Ga
Gama
Amoeba
Kamakiri
Mukade
Dani 

In addition, ten other unnamed participants competed in the event. Hunter × Hunter: The Last Mission 

The only known matchup in the event was Zushi versus Kanjiru. 

Plot

The Battle Olympia is a major event in Hunter × Hunter: The Last Mission, being viewed worldwide by all types of people, namely Milluki and Goreinu, and hosting several VIPs, such as Neon and Garcia. It is also considered to be the world's most famous martial arts festival, according to Cocco. 

Gon and Killua attend the event with Biscuit and Wing in order to support Zushi who has become a Floor Master and is therefore competing in the tournament. 

However, after the Floor Masters get introduced and are preparing for their upcoming fights, the event gets hijacked by Jed, the descendants of the Shadow, and hundreds of Shadow Hunters who take everyone in the building hostage. All of the media attention surrounding the event temporarily turns towards Jed and his associates during this time. Zushi's fight against Kanjiru ends up getting taken over by Gaki, who fights Zushi instead and wins, and Jed knocks out all of the other Floor Masters. 

Jed and his associates get defeated before the next morning, so the Battle Olympia only gets delayed by one day. The Floor Masters still participate in the event despite their injuries, and Zushi and Kanjiru's fight kicks off the event as planned. 

Trivia

Despite the Battle Olympia being an event for only Floor Masters, in Hunter × Hunter: The Last Mission there were twenty-one participants in the event excluding Hisoka Morow, even though there should have only been twenty in addition to Hisoka. However, since Hisoka chose not to participate due to not finding the potential opponents to be interesting enough for him, one of the participants in the Battle Olympia was therefore not a Floor Master, but rather just a sub-in for Hisoka, but it is never established which participant that was.
